queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account functions as a determinant of default and amplifies credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigating the mitigating effect of negative checking account balances on credit risk drivers and their correlation with reduced default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical evaluation of the requested credit amount as a determinant of default and its role in lowering overall credit risk exposure.
